description_long: This house features a modern, boxy architectural design with a flat roof and a mix of light and dark exterior finishes. The front facade includes a small porch area, a central entryway, and landscaped greenery with a tree and shrubs. Large windows are present on the front and sides, providing ample natural light to the interior. The rear of the house is more private, with minimal window openings and a wooden accent panel. The side views reveal a combination of solid wall sections and open garden space, with a visible balcony or terrace on one side. The overall structure is compact, with clean lines and a contemporary urban aesthetic.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with a mix of dark and light finishes, landscaped front yard, and large windows. The design is boxy and contemporary, featuring a small porch and a private rear facade.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, porch, landscaped yard, and a prominent tree.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the solid wall, minimal windows, and a glimpse of the garden and balcony.
description_view_2: Rear view with a large wooden accent panel, minimal windows, and a partially visible balcony.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing more greenery, the side garden, and additional windows.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entry with a small porch, steps, and landscaped elements; modern door with minimal ornamentation.
